import{j as e,m as L,t as $,T as g}from"./index-BrdSe0CA.js";import{b as x}from"./charts-7pOQm6Mk.js";import{a as K}from"./ErpWorkspaceRuntime-BNE8Echs.js";import"./documents-Bhnlew-O.js";function J({products:b=[],warehouses:h=[],transfers:w=[],language:s,currentUser:a,setProducts:A,setTransfers:E,setWarehouses:v,setViewingTransfer:F,setViewingWarehouse:H,showToast:d}){const S=$[s],[f,I]=x.useState(""),[p,q]=x.useState(""),[m,R]=x.useState(""),[c,D]=x.useState(1),[P,T]=x.useState(""),[u,k]=x.useState(null),[y,j]=x.useState(""),[C,N]=x.useState(""),Q=t=>{if(t.preventDefault(),!f||!p||!m)return;if(p===m){d(s==="ar"?"لا يمكن التحويل لنفس المستودع!":"Cannot transfer to the exact same store location!","error");return}const o=b.find(r=>r.id===f);if(!o||o.warehouseId!==p){d(s==="ar"?"الصنف المحدد لا يتبع مخزن المصدر المختار.":"The selected product does not belong to the chosen source warehouse.","error");return}if(!Number.isFinite(c)||c<=0||o.quantity<c){d(S.insufficientStock,"error");return}const l={id:`trsf_${Date.now()}`,productId:f,fromWarehouseId:p,toWarehouseId:m,quantity:c,date:new Date().toISOString(),notes:P,performedBy:String((a==null?void 0:a.name)??"")||(s==="ar"?"أمين مستودع":"Storekeeper"),performedById:String((a==null?void 0:a.id)??"")};A(r=>{const i=r.find(n=>n.id===f);if(!i||i.warehouseId!==p||i.quantity<c)return r;const W=r.find(n=>n.id!==i.id&&n.code===i.code&&n.warehouseId===m),B=r.map(n=>n.id===i.id?{...n,quantity:n.quantity-c}:W&&n.id===W.id?{...n,quantity:n.quantity+c}:n);if(W)return B;const _={...i,id:`prod_${Date.now()}_split`,quantity:c,warehouseId:m,location:`Section ${m.toUpperCase()}`};return[...B,_]}),E(r=>[l,...r]),d(S.transferSuccess),I(""),D(1),T("")};return e.jsxs("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"md:col-span-4 bg-slate-50 p-5 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 space-y-4",children:[e.jsxs("h4",{className:"font-bold text-sm text-slate-800 flex items-center gap-1.5 border-b pb-2",children:[e.jsx(L,{className:"w-4.5 h-4.5 text-cyan-500"}),s==="ar"?"إنشاء أمر تحويل بيني":"Issue Stock Transfer"]}),e.jsxs("form",{onSubmit:Q,className:"space-y-3.5 text-xs",children:[e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"حدد الصنف للتحويل *":"Choose Product to Transfer *"}),e.jsxs("select",{required:!0,value:f,onChange:t=>{const o=t.target.value;I(o);const l=b.find(r=>r.id===o);l!=null&&l.warehouseId&&q(l.warehouseId)},className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 text-slate-750 focus:ring-1 outline-none animate-pulse-subtle",children:[e.jsx("option",{value:"",children:s==="ar"?"-- حدد منتجاً --":"-- Choose Product --"}),b.map(t=>e.jsxs("option",{value:t.id,children:[String((t==null?void 0:t.name)??(s==="ar"?"صنف بدون اسم":"Unnamed product"))," (",s==="ar"?"المتاح بالكامل:":"Stock total:"," ",Number((t==null?void 0:t.quantity)??0)," pcs)"]},t.id))]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3",children:[e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"من مخزن التصدير *":"From Warehouse *"}),e.jsxs("select",{required:!0,value:p,onChange:t=>q(t.target.value),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-2.5 outline-none text-[11px]",children:[e.jsx("option",{value:"",children:s==="ar"?"-- المصدر --":"-- Source WH --"}),h.map(t=>e.jsx("option",{value:t.id,children:String((t==null?void 0:t.name)??"").split("|")[0]},t.id))]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"إلى مخزن الاستقبال *":"To Warehouse *"}),e.jsxs("select",{required:!0,value:m,onChange:t=>R(t.target.value),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-2.5 outline-none text-[11px]",children:[e.jsx("option",{value:"",children:s==="ar"?"-- الهدف --":"-- Dest WH --"}),h.map(t=>e.jsx("option",{value:t.id,children:String((t==null?void 0:t.name)??"").split("|")[0]},t.id))]})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"كمية البضاعة المحولة *":"Quantity to Transfer *"}),e.jsx("input",{type:"number",required:!0,min:"1",value:c,onChange:t=>D(Math.max(1,Number(t.target.value))),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 font-bold"})]}),e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"ملاحظات التحويل والشحن:":"Delivery / Cargo Specifications:"}),e.jsx("textarea",{value:P,onChange:t=>T(t.target.value),placeholder:"e.g., RESTOCK Al-Khobar exhibition display models...",className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 text-xs outline-none focus:ring-1",rows:3})]}),e.jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"w-full bg-cyan-600 hover:bg-cyan-700 text-white font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-xl shadow-md transition cursor-pointer",children:s==="ar"?"تأكيد وشحن الكميات بين الفروع":"Authorize Inter-Store Cargo"})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"md:col-span-8 space-y-4",children:[e.jsx("span",{className:"text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider block",children:s==="ar"?"أرشيف التحويلات وحركات الشحن البينية":"Inter-Store Inventory Cargo Logs"}),e.jsx("div",{className:"border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden max-h-[350px] overflow-y-auto bg-white",children:e.jsxs("table",{className:"w-full text-left text-xs divide-y divide-slate-150",children:[e.jsx("thead",{className:"bg-slate-50 text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-bold uppercase",children:e.jsxs("tr",{children:[e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"الصنف المحول":"Cargo Item"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"من":"From"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"إلى":"To"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"الكمية":"Qty"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"مسؤول الشحن":"By"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"التاريخ":"Date"})]})}),e.jsx("tbody",{className:"divide-y divide-slate-150 text-slate-650",children:w.filter(t=>(a==null?void 0:a.role)==="admin"||(t==null?void 0:t.performedById)===(a==null?void 0:a.id)).length===0?e.jsx("tr",{children:e.jsx("td",{colSpan:6,className:"px-4 py-8 text-center text-slate-400 font-bold",children:S.noData})}):w.filter(t=>(a==null?void 0:a.role)==="admin"||(t==null?void 0:t.performedById)===(a==null?void 0:a.id)).map(t=>{const o=b.find(i=>i.id===t.productId),l=h.find(i=>i.id===t.fromWarehouseId),r=h.find(i=>i.id===t.toWarehouseId);return e.jsxs("tr",{className:"hover:bg-indigo-50/25 transition cursor-pointer",onClick:()=>F(t),title:s==="ar"?"اضغط لعرض التفاصيل وتصديرها":"Click to view full transfer details",children:[e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-bold text-slate-800",children:o?o.name:"Unknown Product"}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 text-[10px]",children:l?String((l==null?void 0:l.name)??"").split("|")[0]:"Primary WH"}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 text-[10px] font-bold text-indigo-600",children:r?String((r==null?void 0:r.name)??"").split("|")[0]:"Secondary WH"}),e.jsxs("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-mono font-bold text-cyan-600",children:[Number((t==null?void 0:t.quantity)??0)," pcs"]}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 text-[10px] text-slate-500",children:String((t==null?void 0:t.performedBy)??"-")}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-[10px] text-slate-400",children:t!=null&&t.date?new Date(t.date).toLocaleDateString():"-"})]},t.id)})})]})}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"bg-slate-50 p-5 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 mt-6 space-y-4",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-center justify-between border-b pb-2",children:[e.jsxs("h4",{className:"font-bold text-xs text-slate-800 flex items-center gap-1.5 font-sans",children:[e.jsx(L,{className:"w-4 h-4 text-cyan-600 font-bold"}),s==="ar"?"إدارة المستودعات والمخازن والفروع والتحويلات":"Manage Warehouse & Store Locations"]}),e.jsxs("span",{className:"text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-mono font-bold",children:[h.length," ",s==="ar"?"مواقع مسجلة":"Registered Locations"]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"bg-white p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 space-y-3",children:[e.jsx("h5",{className:"font-bold text-[11px] text-slate-750",children:u?s==="ar"?"🔧 تعديل بيانات المستودع":"🔧 Edit Warehouse":s==="ar"?"➕ إضافة مستودع / فرع جديد للتصدير والتحويل إليه":"➕ Register New Warehouse Location"}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"space-y-2 text-xs",children:[e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"اسم المستودع / الفرع *":"Warehouse / Branch Name *"}),e.jsx("input",{type:"text",value:y,onChange:t=>j(t.target.value),placeholder:"e.g. Al-Hamra Branch",className:"w-full bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg py-1.5 px-3 font-semibold text-xs text-slate-700"})]}),e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"موقع الفرع / العنوان":"Location / Physical Address"}),e.jsx("input",{type:"text",value:C,onChange:t=>N(t.target.value),placeholder:"e.g. King Fahd Road, Riyadh",className:"w-full bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg py-1.5 px-3 text-xs text-slate-700"})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"flex gap-2 pt-1",children:[e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>{if(!y.trim()){d(s==="ar"?"اسم المستودع مطلوب!":"Warehouse name is required!","error");return}if(u)v(t=>t.map(o=>o.id===u.id?{...o,name:y,location:C}:o)),d(s==="ar"?"تم تعديل بيانات المستودع بنجاح!":"Warehouse updated successfully!");else{const t={id:`wh_${Date.now()}`,name:y,location:C};v(o=>[...o,t]),d(s==="ar"?"تم إضافة المستودع بنجاح!":"Warehouse added successfully!")}k(null),j(""),N("")},className:"flex-1 bg-cyan-600 hover:bg-cyan-700 text-white font-bold py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[11px] transition cursor-pointer",children:u?s==="ar"?"حفظ التعديلات":"Save Changes":s==="ar"?"إضافة المستودع":"Add Warehouse"}),u&&e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>{k(null),j(""),N("")},className:"bg-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-300 text-slate-700 font-bold py-1.5 px-3 rounded-lg text-[11px] transition cursor-pointer",children:s==="ar"?"إلغاء":"Cancel"})]})]})]}),e.jsx("div",{className:"space-y-2 max-h-[220px] overflow-y-auto",children:h.map(t=>e.jsxs("div",{onClick:o=>{o.target.closest("button")||H(t)},className:"bg-white p-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 flex items-center justify-between shadow-3xs hover:border-cyan-400 hover:shadow-xs transition cursor-pointer",title:s==="ar"?"اضغط لعرض محتويات المستودع أو تعديل أو مشاركة":"Click to view stock levels / details / print",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"space-y-0.5",children:[e.jsx("span",{className:"font-bold text-[11px] text-slate-800 block",children:t.name}),e.jsxs("span",{className:"text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-mono block",children:["📍 ",t.location||(s==="ar"?"لا يوجد عنوان":"No address")]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0",children:[e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>{k(t),j(t.name),N(t.location||"")},className:"p-1 text-slate-400 hover:text-cyan-600 transition cursor-pointer",title:s==="ar"?"تعديل":"Edit",children:e.jsx(K,{className:"w-3.5 h-3.5"})}),e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>{if(h.length<=1){d(s==="ar"?"لا يمكن حذف المستودع الوحيد في النظام!":"Cannot delete the only warehouse in the system!","error");return}if(b.filter(l=>l.warehouseId===t.id&&l.quantity>0).length>0){d(s==="ar"?"لا يمكن حذف مخزن يحتوي على أصناف. حوّل الكميات أولًا.":"Cannot delete a warehouse that still contains stock. Transfer its quantities first.","error");return}window.confirm(s==="ar"?"هل أنت متأكد من حذف هذا المستودع بالكامل؟":"Are you sure you want to delete this warehouse?")&&(v(l=>l.filter(r=>r.id!==t.id)),d(s==="ar"?"تم حذف المستودع بنجاح!":"Warehouse deleted successfully!"))},className:"p-1 text-slate-400 hover:text-rose-600 transition cursor-pointer",title:s==="ar"?"حذف":"Delete",children:e.jsx(g,{className:"w-3.5 h-3.5"})})]})]},t.id))})]})]})]})]})}export{J as TransfersScreen};
